title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at K Raheja Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
